eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Lake; Cook; St. Louis, MN; at 11:41 AM on JUL 2, 2019 Effective until 12:41 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test. This is a test from the Lake County Sheriffs office. This is only a test.
